positive: A dynamic mythological creature, a griffin, perched on a crumbling ancient pillar, surveying a magical, fog-filled valley. Style: Epic fantasy illustration, detailed oil painting texture, dramatic lighting, rich jewel tones, intricate feather and scale detail, Greg Rutkowski style.
